volumeHelp: Bësal ngir dugg ci baraabu volume bi
statusLoadingDesc: Dafay sargal weer wi ak leeral audio bi
statusUsingNoDesc: Jëfandiku bi amul ay leeral audio
statusLoadingNoDesc: Dafay sargal weer wi te du am benn leeral ci audio bi
alertDescribedVersion: Jëfandiku wideo biñ leeral ci audio bi
alertNonDescribedVersion: Jëfandiku wideo bi amul ay leeral audio
fallbackError2: Navigateur yii mën nañu ànd ak lecteur bii
prefIntroCaptions: Taamu yii ñooy saytu ni ñuy wanee sous-titre yi.
prefIntroDescription1: Lector bii dafay jàppale leeral audio ci ñaari anam:
prefIntroDescriptionNone: Wideo bi fi nekk amul benn formaa buy wax ci audio.
prefIntroDescription3: Jëfandikool formileer bi ci suuf ngir tànn sa tànneef ci leeral audio ci bind.
prefIntroDescription4: Ginaaw boo denc jekkal yi, mën nga taal wala fay leeral audio ak benn butoŋu bi.
prefIntroKeyboard1: Lector bi ci xët wii mën nga ko jëfandikoo fépp fu nga mëna nekk ak gaawaayu klawieer (xoolal limu bi ci suuf).
prefIntroKeyboard2: Mën nga joxe butoŋu soppikat yi (Alt, Kontrol ak/wala Shift).
prefIntroKeyboard3: GÀTT: Yenn boole butoŋu mën nañu xëccoo ak yi sa nawigatër wala yeneen aplikaasioŋ di jëfandikoo. Jéemal jëfandikoo yeneen xeeti boole ak butoŋu soppi ba nga gis bi gën ci yaw.
prefIntroTranscript: Taamu yii dañu am njeexital ci transkripsioŋ biy weccoo xalaat.
prefCookieWarning: Ngir denc say tànneef fàww nga jëfandikoo kukiis.
prefHeadingKeyboard1: Tombu coppite yi ñuy jëfandikoo ci gaawaayu klawieer
escapeKeyFunction: Tëjal dialog bi fi nekk wala popup bi
prefDescFormatHelp: Sudee formaa yépp am nañu ci, benn ci ñoom kese lañuy jëfandikoo.
prefDescFormatOption1: Wideo bu wuute ak ay leeral ci audio (ñu njëkka enregistre).
prefDescFormatOption1b: beneen anam bu am ay leeral audio
prefDescPause: Dafay noppalu wideo bi ci saasi su leeral bi tàmbalee
prefDescVisible: Wane leeral ci mbind sudee tàmbali
sampleDescriptionText: Defar say jekkal ngir dégg misaalu mbind mii.
prefHighlight: Teg ci transkripsioŋ bi ëmbiit li di gëna dem
prefTabbable: Transkripsioŋ buñ mëna jëfandikoo ci klaweer
windowMoveLeft: Palanteer bi toxu ci cammoy bi
windowMoveAlert: Sànni wala jëfandikoo butoŋu fett yi ngir toxal palanteer bi; Bësal Enter ngir taxaw.
windowSendBackAlert: Palanteer bii nekkul ci ginaaw benn mbir.
windowBringTopAlert: Palanteer bii mingi leegi ci kanamu yeneen mbir yi ci xët wi.
resultsSummary4: Bësal ci waxtu wiñ boole ak bépp mbir ngir wane wideo bi ci barab boobu.
aboutTitle: Lu jëm ci joueur bu mëna
productNameWeb: Joueur bu mëna jouer TOTHOM edisioŋ web
copyrightSuffix: TOTHOM Yelleef yépp ñu ngi ko moom.
webEditionDescription: Edisioŋ biñ personaalise te yaatal ci lector media bi yomb jëfandikoo Able Player. Coppite yi ak yeneen mbir yu TOTHOMweb defar, losisel yuñ moomal lañu.
wpEditionDescription: Plugin WordPress biy yokk benn widget ci Elementor, ñu defaree ko ngir boole ci benn edisioŋ buñ personaalise te yaatal ci lectureur media bi mëna jëfandikoo Able Player. Coppite yi ak yeneen mbir yu TOTHOMweb defar, losisel yuñ moomal lañu.
thirdPartyDescription: Produit bii dafa am losisel bii di open source:
distributedUnder: Ñu ngi koy séddale ci sàrti
